testModifications.reasoning: Test file was created by test-writer; no modifications detected from implementer. Non-null assertion warnings are pre-existing in the test file, not introduced by implementation.

criteria.criterion: AC1: EntityStore.indexEntity(projectId, entity) stores the entity and its linked source + sourceId references, then makes it searchable by searchEntities()
AC2: EntityStore.searchEntities(projectId, 'auth') returns entities with 'auth' in the label or tags
AC3: EntityStore.getByTag(projectId, 'backend') returns all entities tagged 'backend'
AC4: Entity score is computed as |query_terms ∩ entity.tags| / |entity.tags|, and is 0 when there is no overlap
AC5: Entity score only boosts candidate documents linked to the matched entity, and unrelated candidate documents receive entityScore = 0
AC6: Entities from graphify nodes with type code_module are indexed when the graphify_import outbox event fires
AC7: Entities from tickets with type ticket are indexed when the ticket_event outbox event fires

issues: 5 non-null assertion warnings in test file (pre-existing from test-writer, not implementation issue)
type-check and lint on src/rag/entity-store.ts pass

reasoning: All 34 EntityStore tests pass. Implementation meets all 7 acceptance criteria. Entity store uses Map<string, Map<string, Entity>> for project-scoped storage, implements indexEntity, searchEntities (with scoring), getByTag, getAllEntities, clear, and handleOutboxEvent for graphify_import and ticket_event event types. Score computation correctly implements |query_terms ∩ entity.tags| / |entity.tags|. Source file passes lint and type-check. Test file lint warnings are pre-existing from test-writer and do not affect implementation quality.
